title: Invigorating Greek Chorizo Avgolemono
description: A pungent and cozy Greek dish featuring chorizo, miso-marinate, and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients in a traditional avgolemono form, this recipe is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the orzo to the pot and cook until it is tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and lemon juice.
Add the sliced chorizo to the pot and cook until it is browned.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and a splash of the hot broth.
Slowly pour the egg mixture into the pot, stirring constantly.
Add the miso-lemon mixture to the pot and stir to combine.
Season the avgolemono with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the avgolemono hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
